meaning: A global network of remote servers used to store and manage data online.
example: All project files are saved in the cloud so anyone can access them.

meaning: An online storage space accessible by multiple users in an organization.
example: Please upload the client contracts to the department's shared drive.

meaning: To give someone permission to view, edit, or use a file or system.
example: Can you grant access to the designer so they can edit the document?

meaning: Settings that control what a user is allowed to do in a file or software.
example: You need to change the permissions so the client can only view the sheet.

meaning: To record an event, action, or work hours in a digital system.
example: Don't forget to log your working hours in the app before Friday evening.

meaning: A video capture of a computer screen, often with voice explanations.
example: I sent a quick screen recording to show the developer how the error happens.

meaning: An image capture of a computer or phone screen.
example: Please take a screenshot of the error message and send it to IT support.

meaning: A keyboard shortcut used to perform an action quickly.
example: Using the hotkey to mute myself during calls is very convenient.

meaning: To reload a webpage or application to display the latest updates.
example: If the new folder does not appear, try to refresh your browser.

meaning: To restart a computer or device to resolve performance problems.
example: My webcam is not working, so I need to reboot my laptop.

meaning: Software designed to help people work together on tasks and projects remotely.
example: Slack, Zoom, and Trello are essential collaboration tools for our team.

meaning: A temporary folder where outgoing messages are held before they are sent.
example: My email is stuck in the outbox because my internet disconnected.

meaning: The primary folder where incoming emails and messages are received.
example: I came back from vacation to find over one hundred messages in my inbox.

meaning: To store old messages or files in a separate space to keep active areas organized.
example: I archive completed project channels to keep my workspace clean.

meaning: A sound or visual pop-up informing you of a new message or update.
example: I turned off notification alerts on my phone to avoid distractions.

meaning: The digital setup or platform where a team interacts and shares files.
example: Welcome to our digital workspace; please check the onboarding channel.

meaning: Connections between different apps that allow them to share data automatically.
example: We set up integrations to receive task updates directly in Slack.

meaning: A URL that points straight to a specific page, folder, or asset.
example: Here is the direct link to the folder containing the project images.

meaning: A search box where you can type keywords to find items in an app.
example: Type the client's name in the search bar to locate past messages.

meaning: A digital switch that changes between two settings (e.g., on and off).
example: You can toggle the dark mode option in the settings menu.

meaning: Measures and practices to protect systems, networks, and data from attacks.
example: The company holds annual cyber security training to prevent phishing.

meaning: A period when you avoid using computers, phones, or other screens to rest.
example: I am doing a digital detox this weekend and will not check my email.

meaning: Sending or giving access to digital files to other users.
example: File sharing is simple and secure on our cloud platform.

meaning: A duplicate file created to protect against loss of the original data.
example: I keep a backup copy of all my presentations on an external drive.

meaning: A notification that a program or system has stopped working unexpectedly.
example: The design software crashed, but fortunately my work was auto-saved.

meaning: The progress of updating data across different devices to make them match.
example: Please wait for the sync status to show completed before closing the app.

meaning: An improvement to software that adds features, fixes bugs, or improves security.
example: You need to run a system update before installing the new project manager tool.

meaning: A period when a system, network, or server is not running or available.
example: The server down time is scheduled for Sunday morning to avoid disrupting work.

meaning: The state of having an empty email inbox, representing organized communication.
example: Achieving inbox zero before leaving for the weekend feels amazing.

meaning: An unauthorized release of private or sensitive digital information.
example: The company uses data encryption to prevent any accidental data leak.
